meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Setup to Overcome Marketing Gaps
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to automate your marketing tasks. A beginner-friendly checklist for students building their first AI projects.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to launch your app. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you can automate content generation, social media snippets, and landing page copy directly from your codebase. This allows you to focus on engineering while your AI handles the growth mechanics automatically.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks perfecting your architecture, squashing bugs, and building a project you’re proud of. Then reality hits: you have to market it. For most student developers, the terrifying prospect of 'selling' feels like a distraction from the code. You didn't sign up for cold outreach or social media scheduling; you signed up to build.

But what if your codebase could talk for you? By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you turn your project into a self-marketing engine. We are moving beyond manual promotion and into the era of programmatic growth. This is how you bridge the gap between a silent repository and a viral launch.

steps.title: Initialize the Marketing Context
steps.description: Establish a clear identity for your project so the AI can generate consistent messaging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project structure and generate a brand voice profile and a 3-sentence elevator pitch for a non-technical audience.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src/README.md ./package.json --prompt 'Define the target persona and value proposition'

steps.title: Automate Social Snippets
steps.description: Convert your feature logs into engaging social media content automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the latest git commits and write 3 Twitter threads explaining the technical hurdles solved in simple terms.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'git log -n 5' --prompt 'Write 3 engaging tweets based on these changes'

steps.title: Generate Landing Page Copy
steps.description: Use your code context to generate high-converting landing page text.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on my current project implementation, draft a hero section, feature list, and FAQ section for my landing page.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write ./landing_page.md --prompt 'Use project context to write persuasive copy'

steps.title: Build a Content Pipeline
steps.description: Create a script that triggers marketing updates whenever you push new features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a bash script that runs after git push to extract the latest feature and draft a newsletter update.
steps.claude_code_command: claude create ./scripts/auto_market.sh --prompt 'Generate a shell script to automate content drafts'

steps.title: Refine with Feedback Loops
steps.description: Iterate on your marketing assets using real user feedback data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Here is user feedback from my beta testers. Suggest 3 specific code changes to address these pain points.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run ./feedback.txt --prompt 'Analyze feedback and suggest code optimizations'

pro_tips: Never copy-paste marketing text directly; use Claude to generate variations, then blend them with your own unique voice.
Treat your marketing copy as code: store it in version control so you can A/B test different versions of your pitch.
Use Claude Code to document your 'Why' in comments, then pull those comments to populate your technical blog posts.
Automate the extraction of your project's 'hardest technical challenge' to create authentic 'build in public' content.
Link your Antigravity outputs to a markdown file that serves as your 'Marketing API' for your landing page.
content.next_steps: Once your pipeline is set, deploy your landing page using Vercel or Netlify and start sharing your automated updates on X or LinkedIn daily.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical leverage to scale your project without sacrificing your coding time. The barrier between you and your first 1,000 users is just one prompt away. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
